news.t: AVANTIS INVESTORS® LAUNCHES NEW ACTIVE CREDIT ETF

overview.description: The Avantis Credit ETF (AVGB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund utilizes the managers ability to analyze and select fixed income securities from developed markets globally, for income and capital appreciation. The portfolio will focus on investment grade securities, with a portion in high-yield, and intermediate average weighted duration AVGB was launched on Apr 15, 2025 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: AVANTIS INVESTORS® LAUNCHES NEW ACTIVE CREDIT ETF
data.text: KANSAS CITY, Mo. , April 17, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Avantis Investors® , a $55 billion* investment offering from the $245 billion** global asset manager American Century Investments®, expands its invest...
